seoTitle: Evanston Park vs Everard Central — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evanston Park and Everard Central. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evanston Park vs Everard Central: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evanston Park and Everard Central.
heading: Evanston Park vs Everard Central — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evanston Park, South Australia and Everard Central, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evanston Park has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Everard Central (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evanston Park or Everard Central safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evanston Park has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Everard Central scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evanston Park scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Everard Central scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evanston Park or Everard Central?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evanston Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
